name: EasyReZorder
description:
[Wiki Page](https://wiki.roll20.net/Script:EasyReZorder)

Simple z-order manipulation for Roll20 tokens, paths, and text objects. Move selected objects forward/backward by steps, to front/back, or ahead-of/behind a specific object.

Commands:
- `!z-order forward [n]` -- Move forward n steps
- `!z-order backward [n]` -- Move backward n steps
- `!z-order front` -- Bring to front
- `!z-order back` -- Send to back
- `!z-order ahead-of <id>` -- Move ahead of a specific object
- `!z-order behind <id>` -- Move behind a specific object
- `!z-order check` -- Show z-order index
- `!z-order --help` -- Command reference

Optionally integrates with Anchor -- after reordering, calls Anchor.updateZOrder() to propagate z-order changes to anchored children.
